Name: iSchool - MVC
Keywords: C#, HTML, CSS, jQuery, ASP.NET MVC, Visual Studio, Website, MVC App, Academic, Solo
About: A web application built with ASP.NET MVC that consumes a RESTful API, leveraging jQuery and jQuery UI to create dynamic, interactive user interfaces.
My Works:
Integrated RIT’s iSchool RESTful API to retrieve and display dynamic academic data
Implemented the application using ASP.NET MVC architecture for structured data flow
Utilized jQuery and jQuery UI libraries to add interactive components and enhance user experience

Name: Audio Visualizer
Keywords: C++, OpenGL, Visual Studio, Application, Academic, Solo
About: A C++ audio visualizer that uses OpenGL to render real-time, dynamic visual patterns synchronized with audio input.
My Works:
Designed the scene layout and visual elements for an engaging audio-visual experience
Programmed each element’s behavior to dynamically respond to audio data
Developed interactive menus to allow users to select visualizer options and settings

Name: Weather Buddy
Keywords: Figma, FlutterFlow, Academic, Solo, Mobile App
About: A weather app built with FlutterFlow that integrates multiple APIs to provide real-time forecasts, temperature data, and weather insights through an interactive, user-friendly interface.
My Works:
Designed the app layout and interface in Figma for a clean, user-friendly experience
Integrated multiple APIs to fetch weather data, convert coordinates to location names, and provide real-time forecasts

Name: ISchool - React
Keywords: JavaScript, HTML, CSS, React, VS Code, Website, Academic, Solo
About: A web application built with the Vite framework that consumes a RESTful API, utilizing React and React libraries to create dynamic, interactive user interfaces.
My Works:
Integrated RIT’s iSchool RESTful API to retrieve and display dynamic academic data
Reproduced RIT’s visual design style to ensure consistency with existing branding
Developed reusable React components for maintainable and scalable UI development

Name: FundGoodDeeds
Creaters: Junheng Zheng (Team Coordinator), Kevin Zheng (Configuration Manager and Design Coordinator), and Evan Ke (Requirements Coordinator and Quality Coordinator)
Keywords: Java, VS Code, Application, Academic, Group
About: A finance application built in Java with a Swing UI, providing users with interactive tools for managing budgets, tracking expenses, and visualizing financial data.
My Works:
Designed and implemented the MVC architecture to ensure clear separation of concerns
Developed the command-line (CLI) version of the application for core functionality testing
Implemented logic across the Model, View, and Controller layers

Name: Herbalism
Creaters: Sam Denton (Producer), Brady Marr (Asset Creater), Kevin Zheng (Lead Programmer), and Galen Sagarin (Programmer)
Keywords: C#, Unity, Trello, PC Game, Academic, Group
About: A single-player Unity game in C# where you play as an alchemist, brewing potions, refining ingredients, and managing customer requests to grow your potion shop.
My Works:
Served as the lead programmer, overseeing core gameplay implementation
Developed scripts for ingredient handling, refinement tools, and customer interactions
Managed scene transitions and implemented file reading for dialogue and in-game text
Ensured smooth integration of gameplay systems for a cohesive player experience
